channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ COURTNEY LAPLANTE OF SPIRITBOX JOINS ILLENIUM DURING HIS LAS VEGAS SPHERE PERFORMANCE ☠⚡
item.description:
\m/ HELL YEAH, METALHEADS! \m/ Buckle up, because we've got an epic tale ripped straight from the crypts of chaos! Fire up your wallets because this is a wild ride through the glimmering madness of the Las Vegas Sphere that’ll make your crypto heart pound like a double bass pedal!
So check it: Courtney LaPlante, the siren of Spiritbox, just CRASHED Illenium’s electrifying sonic cathedral in Sin City! You heard it right! This wasn’t your average DJ set – no way! This was like adding a goddamn dragon to your already legendary metal fest! Picture this: the lights are flashing like a hallucinogenic trip, beats are dropping harder than a heavy riff, and then BAM! Courtney emerges from the shadows, ready to unleash some vocal hellfire!
This was not just a performance; it was an alliance of two worlds colliding like titanic battleships in a storm! Illenium, the mood maestro of melodic mayhem, spinning tracks that thump through your very bones, and LaPlante, the vocal beast that could wake the dead! They joined forces like a metal/hypertech fusion, taking the crowd to the edge of oblivion and back!
Check the link, dive into the chaos, and witness the fusion of EDM and metal that shook the Sphere to its core! If you’re not partying to this in your crypto-stacked lair, you’re missing out on the uprising!
Let’s shred the walls of reality, one performance at a time! 🖤🤘
#MetalCulture #ThrashMetal #MetalCommunity #Headbangers #Metalheads
item.content:encoded:
\m/ HELL YEAH, METALHEADS! \m/ Buckle up, because we've got an epic tale ripped straight from the crypts of chaos! Fire up your wallets because this is a wild ride through the glimmering madness of the Las Vegas Sphere that’ll make your crypto heart pound like a double bass pedal!
So check it: Courtney LaPlante, the siren of Spiritbox, just CRASHED Illenium’s electrifying sonic cathedral in Sin City! You heard it right! This wasn’t your average DJ set – no way! This was like adding a goddamn dragon to your already legendary metal fest! Picture this: the lights are flashing like a hallucinogenic trip, beats are dropping harder than a heavy riff, and then BAM! Courtney emerges from the shadows, ready to unleash some vocal hellfire!
This was not just a performance; it was an alliance of two worlds colliding like titanic battleships in a storm! Illenium, the mood maestro of melodic mayhem, spinning tracks that thump through your very bones, and LaPlante, the vocal beast that could wake the dead! They joined forces like a metal/hypertech fusion, taking the crowd to the edge of oblivion and back!
Check the link, dive into the chaos, and witness the fusion of EDM and metal that shook the Sphere to its core! If you’re not partying to this in your crypto-stacked lair, you’re missing out on the uprising!
Let’s shred the walls of reality, one performance at a time! 🖤🤘
#MetalCulture #ThrashMetal #MetalCommunity #Headbangers #Metalheads
